name: Xtrium Supplier Graph Schema — Atlas Australia Mines 2024
extraction_instructions:
BASE: BGS Supplier Graph Schema v1.0 rules apply.

SOURCE: Australian Operating Mines 2024 — Geoscience Australia.
Unlike BGS (grouped by operator), Atlas data is SITE-CENTRIC — one supplier object per mine.
company_name = MINE NAME (not the operator company).

INDUSTRY SECTOR from commodity:
- Precious/Base/Battery/Alloy metals, Uranium, REE, Manganese, Diamond, Iron ore → metals mining
- Coal → coal
- Silica, Heavy mineral sands, Phosphate, Bauxite, Graphite, Potash → industrial minerals

supply_chain_tier: Always 1 (all Atlas sites are extraction sites).

manufacturing_sites: location = '{MineName} ({lat}, {long})'. country = 'Australia'. site_type = 'mine'. raw = verbatim Atlas entry text.

ATLAS EXTRAS (required on every record):
- state: 2-3 letter state code from raw field (WA, QLD, NSW, SA, VIC, TAS, NT, ACT)
- operational_status: 'Operating mine' | 'Care and maintenance' | 'Development'
- latitude: WGS84 decimal (negative for Australia)
- longitude: WGS84 decimal (positive for Australia)
- source_doi: always '10.26186/150821'

FIXED: is_verified=false, supplier_id=null, supply_chain_tier=1, source_url='https://digital.atlas.gov.au/datasets/australian-operating-mines-2024'

fields.name: company_name
fields.description: Full legal company name exactly as printed in source. Do not abbreviate.

fields.name: canonical_name
fields.description: Derived: lowercase, & → 'and', spaces → hyphens, remove punctuation. 'Tarmac Ltd' → 'tarmac-ltd'

fields.name: headquarters_location
fields.description: 'City, Country' format. e.g. 'Buxton, United Kingdom'. Null if not available.

fields.name: website
fields.description: Company website URL. Null in BGS DMQ — populated separately.

fields.name: company_description
fields.description: Brief description of the company. Null from BGS DMQ alone.

fields.name: industry_sector
fields.description: Based on primary commodity. See sector mapping in extraction_instructions.

fields.name: manufacturing_sites
fields.description: ONE entry per physical site. Each: {location:'Site Name (GridRef or Lat/Long)', country, site_type:'quarry|mine|pit|oil well|gas well|brine well|handling site|wharf|processing plant|spoil heap|recycling facility|peat workings', raw:'verbatim source text'}

fields.name: products_offered
fields.description: ONE entry per site per commodity per end-use. Each: {product_name, grade, product_id:'GridRef_CommodCode_Grade', category, source_url, datasheet_url:null, cross_graph_material_id:null}

fields.name: sources
fields.description: BGS: [{source_name:'BGS Directory of Mines and Quarries 2020, 11th Edition', source_url:'https://www.bgs.ac.uk/mineralsuk/download/directory-of-mines-and-quarries-2020/', doi:null, tier:'tier1'}]

fields.name: state
fields.description: Australian state/territory where the mine is located.

fields.name: operational_status
fields.description: Mine operational status from Atlas 2024 dataset.

fields.name: latitude
fields.description: WGS84 decimal latitude. Negative for Australia (Southern Hemisphere). e.g. -30.368888

fields.name: longitude
fields.description: WGS84 decimal longitude. Positive for Australia. e.g. 121.148544

fields.name: source_doi
fields.description: Dataset DOI. Always '10.26186/150821' for Australian Operating Mines 2024.
